dublinCore.dc:title: 118 HR 6628 IH: Protect Greenbury Point Conservation Area Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Elfreth introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To prohibit the Secretary of the Navy from constructing a golf course or restrict public access to the Greenbury Point Conservation Area at Naval Support Activity Annapolis, Maryland.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Protect Greenbury Point Conservation Area Act.

section.header: Prohibition on Development of a Golf Course At Greenbury Point Conservation Area At Naval Support Activity Annapolis, Maryland
section.text: Section 2855 of the Military Construction Act for Fiscal Year 2024 (division B of Public Law 118–31) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the section heading, by striking Limitation on authority to modify or restrict public access to and inserting Prohibition on development of a golf course at;
in subsection (a), by inserting construct a golf course on, or otherwise before modify or restrict; and

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1), by striking ; or and inserting a semicolon;
in paragraph (2), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; or; and
by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

paragraph.text: restrictions related to environmental restoration of the Greenbury Point Conservation Area in a manner consistent with existing law and regulation.
